response.justification: While Bogdan has extensive experience in software development, his primary expertise lies in web, mobile, and embedded systems using languages like TypeScript, Node.js, and Dlang, with only limited and dated exposure to C++. His recent roles focus on full-stack development and AI infrastructure, which do not align closely with the C++-heavy requirements of the Senior Manager — Digital Solutions role. However, his background in high-performance systems (e.g., low-latency apps, micro-services) and secure development practices (e.g., TDD, CI/CD) could be transferable.
strengths: Strong background in high-performance systems and low-latency applications, demonstrating scalability expertise.
Experience with secure development practices (e.g., TDD, CI/CD) and DevOps (Docker, Kubernetes), relevant to industrial automation.
Proven ability to mentor teams and contribute to open-source projects, indicating collaborative and technical leadership.
concerns: Limited recent and relevant C++ experience (last significant C++ role was in 2015; current stack is primarily JavaScript/TypeScript and Dlang).
No explicit mention of IEC 62443, industrial cybersecurity, or Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) practices in recent roles.
Lacks direct experience with industrial automation protocols (e.g., Modbus, OPC UA) or cloud platforms (e.g., Microsoft Azure) specified as advantageous.

key_factors.factor: Secure Development and Industrial Cybersecurity Experience
Industrial Automation and Cloud Platform Experience
